title: GoalCompletedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `goal_completed` event — goal reached its terminal state. See spec/goal-lifecycle-v1.md §5.4.

reason.description: Free-text rationale for completion. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.

status.description: Terminal status — `"completed" | "failed" | "suspended"`. Optional in v1 for back-compat with emitters that predate the field.
